scope_summary: Bug fix for Slava's manually-found regression: creating a new claim and navigating to /claims/CLM-#### rendered CLM-1006 / Роберт Джонсон / Toyota Camry instead of the created claim's data. Root cause was Redux state locked on boot-time loadClaimDetail('CLM-1006') + goldenClaim fallback leak + hardcoded /claims/CLM-1006 navigation. Plus secondary backend bug: Description dropped at SyntheticClaimSummary projection and HybridClaimReadService.GetClaim. Fixed. New Playwright regression added. No commit, no push, no Azure.

submitted_fields.description: Короткий опис обставин події. Синтетичний тестовий кейс для перевірки повного UI-flow.

manual_bug.reproduced_by: e2e/21-created-claim-detail-binding.spec.ts (case 1) — fails on pre-fix code, passes on fixed code

primary_frontend: src/app/rootSaga.ts:22 dispatched loadClaimDetail('CLM-1006') ONCE at app boot; no per-route re-dispatch → Redux state locked on CLM-1006 forever
src/components/layout/ClaimShell.tsx:18 literally set `const c = goldenClaim;` for breadcrumb customer/vehicle — full-time CLM-1006 hardcode
secondary_backend: server/InsuranceAIPlatform.Api/Services/HybridClaimReadService.cs:81 returned Description: string.Empty for DB-only claims
server/InsuranceAIPlatform.Services.Claims/IClaimsService.cs SyntheticClaimSummary record did not carry Description at all

why_prior_tests_missed_it: 08-zero-to-end and similar specs only asserted URL match (waitForURL(/CLM-\d+/)); none asserted the rendered header/breadcrumb/description tile contained the created customer/vehicle/VIN/description, and none asserted the absence of CLM-1006 / Роберт Джонсон / Toyota Camry as the active claim subject. URL match is necessary but not sufficient — any URL can render any data.
missing_assertion: After /claims/{createdId}, assert visible DOM (claim-header-title, claim-shell-id/customer/vehicle, claim-detail-customer/vehicle/vin/event-type/location/description-text) contains the CREATED claim's data AND does NOT contain CLM-1006 / Роберт Джонсон / Toyota Camry as the active subject.

asserts_positive: claim-shell-id has text equal to created id
list-row click re-opens with created data

asserts: breadcrumb shows CLM-1006 / Роберт Джонсон / Toyota Camry
sandbox notice has count 0 (rich golden render preserved)

proof_created_claim_detail_binding: e2e/21-created-claim-detail-binding.spec.ts case 1 PASS — checks rendered DOM text on claim-header-title, claim-shell-*, claim-detail-* testids matches submitted data AND does NOT contain CLM-1006 markers
proof_clm_1006_still_works: e2e/21-created-claim-detail-binding.spec.ts case 2 PASS + all 6 existing CLM-1006-focused specs PASS (05-claim-1006, 06-claim-actions, 08-zero-to-end, 12-workspace-deep, 15-risks, 17-audit)
limitations: Description fix required a small backend change (SyntheticClaimSummary record + ToSummary + HybridClaimReadService.GetClaim) — surfaced by the regression test itself, fixed in this gate.
Sub-resource tabs (Documents/AI/Approval/Audit) for fresh DB-created claims render honest empty states; per-tab seeding for new claims is out of scope for this fix gate.
Single-browser coverage (Chromium only); Firefox/WebKit not exercised.
HybridClaimReadService still bridges sync->async via .GetAwaiter().GetResult() — inherited from prior gate, unchanged.
Pre-existing e2e/08-zero-to-end.spec.ts is URL-only; preserved as-is; new e2e/21-* is the content-level guard.

next_safe_step.name: MANUAL_OPERATOR_BROWSER_CLICK_THROUGH_V5
next_safe_step.description: Slava re-runs the exact manual flow he reported (create claim → land on /claims/CLM-#### → verify visible header/body shows the new customer/vehicle/VIN/description, NOT CLM-1006 / Роберт Джонсон / Toyota Camry). Expected duration 5-10 min.
